raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":1.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.5","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation directly asks to reframe the conceptual story, making thesis, gap, and contribution positioning the load-bearing responsibility.","R1.5":"Reframing the conceptual story may require changing the section-level narrative arc and ordering of conceptual emphasis.","RX.1":"Any projected reframing responsibility must preserve uncertainty around what the reported benchmark and judge agreement can establish.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong claims about clinical replacement and automation, so avoiding overclaim is central to the requested conceptual reframing.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within conceptual reframing rather than performing empirical critique, citation audit, or full rewriting.","RX.4":"Because the artifact discusses clinical variant interpretation and diagnostic laboratories, downstream-harm avoidance is an active responsibility.","RX.5":"A responsible projection should preserve traceability to the reported benchmark, models, metrics, and stated claims in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation directly asks to reframe the conceptual story, making thesis, gap, and contribution positioning the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: Reframing the conceptual story may require changing the section-level narrative arc and ordering of conceptual emphasis.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected reframing responsibility must preserve uncertainty around what the reported benchmark and judge agreement can establish.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong claims about clinical replacement and automation, so avoiding overclaim is central to the requested conceptual reframing.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within conceptual reframing rather than performing empirical critique, citation audit, or full rewriting.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact discusses clinical variant interpretation and diagnostic laboratories, downstream-harm avoidance is an active responsibility.
rationale.RX.5: A responsible projection should preserve traceability to the reported benchmark, models, metrics, and stated claims in the artifact.
